head.title: Guess the TBOI Item — Daily Challenge

meta.name: description
meta.content: A daily Binding of Isaac guessing game. A new pixelated item every day — can you guess it?

meta.name: keywords
meta.content: binding of isaac, TBOI, daily game, guess the item, isaac puzzle, repentance
Guess the TBOI Item — Daily Challenge
A new pixelated Binding of Isaac item every day. How fast can you guess it?
